name: Synlig AEO Service
description: Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) service for Norwegian B2B SaaS and software companies — accounting SaaS, HR SaaS, healthcare SaaS, fintech, marketing SaaS and vertical SaaS. We help Norwegian SaaS get cited when buyers ask ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google AI Overview for software recommendations, through SoftwareApplication schema.org markup, alternative-to and integration pages, and AI-optimized content.

skills.name: Free AEO Audit
skills.description: Instant AI-visibility audit for any business website. Returns score (0-100), grade (A-F), and prioritized recommendations. Free, no signup required. Works for any URL but tuned for Norwegian B2B SaaS.
examples: Audit the AEO score for https://example.no
How visible is this SaaS in ChatGPT and Perplexity?

endpointParams.url: required — the website URL to audit

skills.name: AEO Implementation for B2B SaaS
skills.description: Full AEO implementation for Norwegian B2B SaaS and software companies: SoftwareApplication schema.org markup, alternative-to and integration pages, AI-optimized buyer-question content, and ongoing monitoring. Pricing: AI-synlighetsanalyse 4 900 NOK (one-time), AI-synlighetsfundament 14 900 NOK (one-time, includes implementation), Løpende overvåking 4 900 NOK/month (subscription, 3-month minimum). Order directly via web form, EHF invoice within 24h.

supportedInterfaces.description: Free AEO audit endpoint. GET ?url=<website> returns JSON with score (0-100), grade (A-F), and prioritized recommendations.
B2B SaaS vertical landing page. Describes the AEO playbook for Norwegian SaaS, with three pricing tiers and inline lead-capture forms.
Web order form. Accepts ?slug=<tier-key> to preselect a package. Norwegian EHF invoice within 24h. No payment-up-front required.
